his lifetime. If there is
no chance of the Dasa of the 5th lord being enjoyed, then
we have to find out the planets which will influence the 5th
house by way of occupation and aspect and whether the
native will enjoy the Dasa of such planets.
In timing events pertaining to the 5th house, the
following factors have to be noted :—
(a) The lord, (b) the planet or planets aspecting the 5th
house, (c) planet or planets posited in the 5th house, (d)
planets aspecting the lord of the 5th house, (e) planet or
planets in association with the lord of the 5th house, (f) the
lord of the 5th from the Moon and the karaka of the 5th
bhava.
The factors above mentioned are capable of
influencing the 5th house, either as lords of main periods
(Dasas) or as lords of sub-periods (Bhuktis) or as lords of
still minor periods.
The sub-periods of planets capable of influencing the
5th house, in the major periods of planets capable of
influencing the 5th produce results pertaining to the 5th
